user_query: Add a zucchini noodle pesto bowl dinner option for mother on day 4

fields.name: Zucchini Noodle Pesto Bowl
fields.short_description: A light, nutrient-dense dinner of spiralized zucchini tossed with basil-pesto, cherry tomatoes, toasted pine nuts, and a sprinkle of parmesan — low-carb and packed with vitamins.
fields.meal_suggestion: Spiralize 2–3 medium zucchinis and lightly sauté or toss raw to preference. Prepare a pesto by blending fresh basil, garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, toasted pine nuts (or walnuts), and a small amount of parmesan; season to taste. Gently toss zucchini noodles with the pesto, fold in halved cherry tomatoes and a handful of baby spinach. Top with extra grated parmesan and a sprinkle of toasted pine nuts. Optionally add grilled chicken or chickpeas for extra protein.
fields.nutrition_note: Low in carbohydrates and calories while high in vitamins A and C from zucchini and tomatoes; basil and olive oil provide antioxidants and healthy fats. Pine nuts and parmesan contribute some protein and calcium; adding a lean protein (grilled chicken or chickpeas) can make it a more balanced meal. Suitable as a lighter, vegetable-forward dinner option.

result.reasoning: Appended to Mother Day 4 Dinner (position -1) to provide a lighter, vegetable-forward option complementing existing heartier dinner meals.
